name: Honey, It's Parsnips
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Parsnips, peeled and diagonally sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook parsnips in water and salt over medium heat until fork-tender, about 10 minutes.
2. Drain the parsnips and remove them from the pan.
3. In the same pan, heat butter, honey, orange juice, and orange peel together; toss with the parsnips and a little salt if desired.
4. Serve hot.
